title: isocoma rusbyi
intro: Isocoma rusbyi, also known as Rusby's golden bush or Rusby's yarrow golden bush, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is a shrub that grows up to 1 meter in height and is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The medicinal properties of Isocoma rusbyi include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health issues such as wounds, fever, and respiratory problems. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and salves, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and relieving symptoms of colds and flu.
